_comment: Staging R2 lifecycle — apply with: aws s3api put-bucket-lifecycle-configuration --bucket thesis-staging --endpoint-url https://<R2_ACCOUNT_ID>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com --lifecycle-configuration file://deploy/r2-lifecycle-staging.json. Durable prefixes (originals/, revisions/, sealed/, exports/) have NO expiration rule by design — verify no rule matches them before applying (docs/phase5/data-map.md).
